items.title: Solana Sets Monthly Record as Stablecoin Volume Hits $650B
items.whyYouShouldCare: The surge in stablecoin volume to $650B indicates increased liquidity and user engagement within the Solana ecosystem, potentially enhancing its market positioning.

items.title: ‘Not an April Fools joke’: Major Solana-based trading platform Drift exploited for at least $200 million
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $200 million exploit of Drift highlights significant vulnerabilities in Solana's DeFi landscape, which could impact user trust and overall platform stability.

items.title: Solana DeFi Exchange Drift Protocol Exploited, Upwards of $285 Million Stolen
items.whyYouShouldCare: With upwards of $285 million stolen from Drift, the incident raises concerns about security measures in Solana's DeFi projects, affecting investor confidence and ecosystem growth.
